description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The front facade is dominated by a large, dark double gate with gold accents, likely serving as a garage entrance, and a wide set of floor-to-ceiling windows above, allowing ample natural light into the upper living space. The exterior walls are finished in a muted lavender-gray color, contrasting with the cream-colored interior walls visible through the open roof and windows. The interior layout includes multiple rooms, visible staircases, and built-in cabinetry, suggesting a functional and compact urban residence. Minimal exterior ornamentation and the use of large glass panels emphasize a contemporary aesthetic. The house appears to be designed for a single family, with practical access points and a secure, enclosed perimeter.
description: A modern, boxy house with a flat roof, large front windows, and a prominent double garage gate. The exterior is lavender-gray with cream interior walls and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large double garage gate with gold accents and expansive upper windows, revealing the interior living space.
description_view_1: Rear view with a plain lavender-gray wall and partial visibility of the interior layout, including cabinetry and room divisions.
description_view_2: Side view dominated by a solid lavender-gray wall, with the upper window and interior partially visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the stairwell cutout, interior rooms, and some wall decor, with less exterior detail.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on the front, minimal or no windows on other sides
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry through a large double metal gate with gold accents, no porch or steps, minimalistic and secure design
